seoTitle: Macquarie Park vs Maddens Plains — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Macquarie Park and Maddens Plains. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Macquarie Park vs Maddens Plains: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Macquarie Park and Maddens Plains.
heading: Macquarie Park vs Maddens Plains — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Macquarie Park, New South Wales and Maddens Plains, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Macquarie Park has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Maddens Plains (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Macquarie Park or Maddens Plains safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Macquarie Park has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Maddens Plains scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Macquarie Park scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Maddens Plains scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Macquarie Park or Maddens Plains?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Macquarie Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
